title: Monitor
description: A Datadog monitor that watches a metric or check and alerts when thresholds are exceeded

id.description: The unique numeric identifier of the monitor, assigned by Datadog upon creation

type.description: The type of monitor that determines the query language and alerting behavior

query.description: The monitor query expression using Datadog's query language for the specified monitor type

name.description: A descriptive name for the monitor used for identification in dashboards and notifications

message.description: The notification message body sent when the monitor triggers, supports template variables and @-mentions

tags.description: List of tags to associate with the monitor for filtering and organization

priority.description: The monitor priority level from 1 (highest) to 5 (lowest), used for sorting and filtering

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the monitor was created

modified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the monitor was last modified

deleted.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the monitor was deleted, or null if not deleted

restricted_roles.description: List of role IDs whose members can edit this monitor; empty means all users can edit
